Buffalo Bills.name: Buffalo Bills
Buffalo Bills.description: The NFL franchise Pegula owns, giving him a major platform in professional football and the Buffalo regional economy.

Buffalo Sabres.name: Buffalo Sabres
Buffalo Sabres.description: The NHL franchise Pegula owns, pairing with the Bills to make him the dominant sports owner in western New York.

East Resources.name: East Resources
East Resources.description: The natural gas company Pegula founded and sold for $4.7 billion, the original source of his wealth and a node in US energy markets.

US Department of Justice.name: US Department of Justice
US Department of Justice.description: The federal executive department Bondi leads as Attorney General, overseeing federal law enforcement and prosecution across the United States.

Google.name: Google
Google.description: The core search, advertising, and cloud subsidiary of Alphabet that Pichai also directly oversees and that generates the vast majority of Alphabet's revenue.

Point72 Asset Management.name: Point72 Asset Management
Point72 Asset Management.description: The hedge fund Cohen founded and runs, managing roughly $35 billion and serving as his primary vehicle for financial market influence.

New York Mets.name: New York Mets
New York Mets.description: The MLB franchise Cohen owns, giving him a prominent public platform and significant influence in New York sports and media.

The Washington Post.name: The Washington Post
The Washington Post.description: The nationally influential newspaper Bezos owns personally, giving him direct control over a major US media institution.

Blue Origin.name: Blue Origin
Blue Origin.description: The aerospace and space-tourism company Bezos founded and funds, a distinct organization from Amazon competing in the commercial space sector.

Salesforce.name: Salesforce
Salesforce.description: The enterprise cloud software company Benioff co-founded and leads as CEO, making him one of the most powerful figures in US enterprise technology.

Time.name: Time
Time.description: The iconic US news magazine Benioff owns personally, giving him direct control over a historically influential American media brand.

Cato Institute.name: Cato Institute
Cato Institute.description: The libertarian think tank the Kochs co-founded and have long funded, shaping US policy discourse on free markets, civil liberties, and limited government.

Airbnb.name: Airbnb
Airbnb.description: The global short-term rental marketplace Chesky co-founded and leads as CEO, making him the central node of a platform that has reshaped US and global hospitality markets.
